periods.summary: Wrote first game — Arkanoid — in Basic on a ДВК computer in the abandoned observatory of the Pioneer Palace. Placed second in the district math olympiad the same year. Age 10.
First professional job. Built and maintained the e-commerce site for an Asus and ZALMAN distributor. Ran email marketing campaigns.
BabyTv.com — 40+ modules, CMS, multilingual content. First large CMS project and first exposure to multilingual content work, a thread that reappeared in every later role.

Flash-based 3D online configurator for event tables. Combined design and development. First contact with visual programming in the browser — the early seed of the data-visualization specialty that followed.
Reverse-auction marketplace Bidsarena.com. Full stack end-to-end: database, API, frontend, CMS. Understanding of the marketplace model.

Web portal for cloud-based PC remote management and diagnostics. Helped ordinary users solve technical problems on their devices. First taste of a mass-audience SaaS product. Acquired by Asurion for ~$100–130M; 3M+ downloads; TechCrunch Disrupt 2010 winner.

Web player and editor UI for an AI text-to-video platform. Canvas-based rendering, timeline editor, real-time media work. Clients included Bloomberg, Reuters, HubSpot, Condé Nast. Acquired by Vimeo (2021). Grand Prix UNESCO; Best Mobile Publishing Product at MWC Barcelona.

Built the SVG-based visual editor for data pipelines — core product feature. Led the frontend team through a Backbone.js → Angular migration. Later merged with DreamFactory, FlyData and Intermix.io into Integrate.io.

Built a design system from scratch for three platforms (Web App, CRM, Landing Portals) in under a year. Figma → Storybook sync. Hired and trained the frontend team from interns. Acquired by Check Point for $490M.

Theme manager for digital brands — productizing the design-system practice as shared visual language between designers and developers. 4-person team, REST API infrastructure. Attempt to turn a repeated deliverable into a product of its own.
Marketplace for blue-collar hiring — cleaning, moving, hospitality. Real-time matching, scheduling, payments. Full product ownership from idea to investor pitch that secured funding.

Led AngularJS 1.5 → React migration. Built @zerto/shared-fe design system: 56+ components across 4 apps, Atomic Design, dual-format npm package. D3.js topology graphs, heatmaps, real-time RPO monitoring. Acquired by HPE for $374M.

Lead contributor on the Zerto micro-application inside HPE GreenLake Storage Console. 1,498 commits (34%) on the final product. Cross-origin ShellAPI bridge, RBAC, 12 feature flags, Keycloak SSO. Transition from IC to Tech Lead. Began documentation-first, AI-assisted delivery workflow.
